[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 101100110 5
1 101011010 5
2 111111101 8
3 100111111 7
4 011100111 6
5 001111111 7
6 101100110 5
7 101111011 7

01 10 011111111 8
12 21 001111111 7 match 5
23 32 001101011 5
34 43 101101111 7
45 54 101111110 7
56 65 111011011 7
67 76 110111111 8
70 07 111100111 7

02 20 011100111 6 match 4
13 31 001111111 7 match 5
24 42 101100110 5 match 0 6
35 53 101111011 7 match 7
46 64 111111111 a
57 75 101111110 7
60 06 111111101 8 match 2
71 17 100111111 7 match 3

03 30 011101111 7
14 41 101111111 8
25 52 101011010 5 match 1
36 63 111111011 8
47 74 101100110 5 match 0 6
50 05 111111111 a
61 16 110111111 8
72 27 101100110 5 match 0 6

37 73 101101111 7
